title: salix × ambigua var. longifolia
intro: Salix × ambigua var. longifolia, also known as Willowleaf Willow, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Salix genus. The medicinal properties of Salix × ambigua var. longifolia lie in its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The plant offers several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Salix × ambigua var. longifolia include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation.
